title: Context Engineering and Repository Grounding · Regression Repair Bay
summary: Ground an agent in a large unfamiliar repository without flooding its context. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a repository context map and retrieval plan and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Rank repository files, official docs, generated artifacts, tests, and user statements by authority for the task.
Provide paths, search terms, dependency boundaries, and examples that route efficient discovery.
Separate one-turn constraints from durable repository instructions such as AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Context Refresh evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Context Refresh assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Use a changed debug case for prompt context engineering that tests this competency: Refresh drift-prone facts and summarize stable discoveries before context compaction.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Context Refresh has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: Name the Context Refresh precondition or invariant that the debug case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed debug case for prompt context engineering that tests this competency: Refresh drift-prone facts and summarize stable discoveries before context compaction.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Once loaded, external documentation never needs revalidation.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints for the debug Context Refresh case
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure for the debug Context Refresh case
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence for the debug Context Refresh case
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise for the debug Context Refresh case

options.text: The Source Authority record says a repository context map and retrieval plan looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve inspect the failure record.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-context-refresh-wp2r8m" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Context Refresh into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-context-refresh-wp2r8m
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Context Refresh structural check is only one gate. a repository context map and retrieval plan must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

steps.why: Retrieving Context Refresh through the concrete a repository context map and retrieval plan case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Refresh drift-prone facts and summarize stable discoveries before context compaction.
